title: Galician Paella
description: Traditional Spanish one-pot dish from the Galicia region, featuring piquant and savory flavors.
instructions: Heat oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add piquant and cook, stirring occasionally, until heated through.
Add Galician and stir to coat with oil.
Add 2 1/4 cups water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Increase heat to high and cook, uncovered, until liquid has evaporated and rice is tender.
